wav2lip.description: Wav2Lip base (Rudrabha/Wav2Lip, primepake/wav2lip_288x288 fork) — max lip-sync accuracy, 96x96 native. Pair with GFPGAN for sharp mouth. CC-BY-NC (LRS2 training data) — set FLICKIES_ENABLE_NONCOMMERCIAL=1 to load.

wav2lip-gan.description: Wav2Lip + GAN refiner — sharper mouth standalone, slightly worse sync than base. CC-BY-NC — set FLICKIES_ENABLE_NONCOMMERCIAL=1 to load.

latentsync-1.5.description: LatentSync 1.5 (ByteDance, Apache-2.0) — SD-1.5 latent-space lipsync, commercial-safe default on CUDA. Slower than Wav2Lip, no opt-in gate. Fits RTX 3060 12GB.

gfpgan.description: GFPGAN v1.4 face restore (TencentARC/GFPGAN, Apache-2.0) — chains after Wav2Lip to fix the soft 96x96 mouth crop.
